sql.sql:
SELECT t1.tok_id AS t1_tok_id, t1.doc_id AS t1_doc_id, t1.sentence_id AS t1_sentence_id, t1.seq_id AS t1_seq_id, t1.doc_pos AS t1_doc_pos, t1.tok_pos AS t1_tok_pos, t1.form AS t1_form, t1.lemma AS t1_lemma, t1.upos AS t1_upos, t1.dep_rel AS t1_dep_rel, t1.head_tok_pos AS t1_head_tok_pos
FROM toks t1
WHERE 1=1 AND t1.lemma = 'the'
sqlStatements:
SELECT t1.tok_id AS t1_tok_id, t1.doc_id AS t1_doc_id, t1.sentence_id AS t1_sentence_id, t1.seq_id AS t1_seq_id, t1.doc_pos AS t1_doc_pos, t1.tok_pos AS t1_tok_pos, t1.form AS t1_form, t1.lemma AS t1_lemma, t1.upos AS t1_upos, t1.dep_rel AS t1_dep_rel, t1.head_tok_pos AS t1_head_tok_pos
FROM toks t1
WHERE 1=1 AND t1.lemma = 'the'
